title: Nursery Rhyme. DCVI. Local.
content:
Little boy, pretty boy, where was you born?
        In Lincolnshire, master: come blow the cow's horn.
        A half-penny pudding, a penny pie,
        A shoulder of mutton, and that love I.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCVI. Local."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
